Headline: #82 Kimball-Homan Temporary Reroute near Kimball/Newport.
ShortDescription: #82 Kimball-Homan buses temporarily rerouted: due to, police activity near Kimball/Newport.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#82 Kimball-Homan buses temporarily rerouted: due to, police activity near Kimball/Newport.

Northbound buses will operate via Kimball, Belmont, Kedzie, Addison and Kimball.

Southbound buses will operate via Kimball, Addison, Kedzie, Belmont and Kimball.

Allow extra travel time.
